---
title: "tusco_radars"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-10"
---

# TUSCO plotting of final radar plots

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r install-packages, include=FALSE}
# List of required packages
required_packages <- c(
  "ggplot2",
  "patchwork",
  "cowplot",
  "dplyr",
  "tidyr",
  "ggstats",
  "ggpubr"
)

# Install missing packages
missing_packages <- required_packages[!required_packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  message("Installing missing packages: ", paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "))
  install.packages(missing_packages, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
}
```

```{r libraries}

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggstats)  # for geom_stripped_rows()
library(ggpubr)

# Create output directory if it doesn't exist
if (file.exists("src/plotting/R/00_figure_config.R")) {
  source("src/plotting/R/00_figure_config.R")
} else if (file.exists("R/00_figure_config.R")) {
  source("R/00_figure_config.R")
} else {
  stop("Cannot find 00_figure_config.R; set wd to repo root or src/plotting.")
}
r_source_dir <- paper_r_source_dir()
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "02_themes.R"))
out_dir <- plot_creation_dir()
```



```{r }
# Corrected function to load all TUSCO results
tusco_rdata_path_parts <- function(file_path) {
  fp <- normalizePath(file_path, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
  rel <- sub("^.*/tusco_results/", "", fp)
  if (identical(rel, fp) || !grepl("_tusco\\.RData$", rel)) {
    stop("Not a TUSCO result file: ", file_path, call. = FALSE)
  }
  rel <- sub("_tusco\\.RData$", "", rel)
  parts <- strsplit(rel, "/", fixed = TRUE)[[1L]]
  parts[nzchar(parts)]
}

nest_tusco_results <- function(tree, parts, value) {
  if (length(parts) == 1L) {
    tree[[parts[1L]]] <- value
    return(tree)
  }
  if (is.null(tree[[parts[1L]]]) || !is.list(tree[[parts[1L]]])) {
    tree[[parts[1L]]] <- list()
  }
  tree[[parts[1L]]] <- nest_tusco_results(tree[[parts[1L]]], parts[-1L], value)
  tree
}

#' Keep only fields used by radar/dumbbell figures (drop large plot tables).
trim_tusco_branch <- function(x) {
  if (!is.list(x)) {
    return(x)
  }
  if (all(c("radar_df", "radar") %in% names(x))) {
    return(x[c("radar_df", "radar")])
  }
  lapply(x, trim_tusco_branch)
}

load_tusco_results <- function(base_dir, verbose = FALSE) {
  base_dir <- normalizePath(base_dir, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
  if (!dir.exists(base_dir)) {
    stop("TUSCO results directory not found: ", base_dir, call. = FALSE)
  }
  rdata_files <- list.files(
    base_dir,
    pattern = "_tusco\\.RData$",
    recursive = TRUE,
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  if (length(rdata_files) == 0L) {
    stop("No *_tusco.RData files under: ", base_dir, call. = FALSE)
  }

  tusco_results <- list()
  n_ok <- 0L
  n_skip <- 0L

  for (file_path in rdata_files) {
    if (!file.exists(file_path) || file.info(file_path)$size == 0) {
      n_skip <- n_skip + 1L
      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message("Skipping empty or missing: ", file_path)
      }
      next
    }

    path_parts <- tryCatch(
      tusco_rdata_path_parts(file_path),
      error = function(e) {
        if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
          message(conditionMessage(e))
        }
        NULL
      }
    )
    if (is.null(path_parts) || length(path_parts) == 0L) {
      n_skip <- n_skip + 1L
      next
    }

    load_env <- new.env()
    ok <- tryCatch({
      load(file_path, envir = load_env)
      loaded_objects <- ls(load_env)
      if (length(loaded_objects) == 0L) {
        if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
          message("No objects in: ", file_path)
        }
        return(FALSE)
      }
      loaded_data <- if ("data_list" %in% loaded_objects) {
        load_env$data_list
      } else {
        get(loaded_objects[1], envir = load_env)
      }
      loaded_data <- trim_tusco_branch(loaded_data)
      tusco_results <- nest_tusco_results(tusco_results, path_parts, loaded_data)
      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message("Loaded: ", paste(path_parts, collapse = "/"))
      }
      TRUE
    }, error = function(e) {
      if (isTRUE(verbose)) {
        message("ERROR loading ", file_path, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
      }
      FALSE
    })

    if (isTRUE(ok)) {
      n_ok <- n_ok + 1L
    } else {
      n_skip <- n_skip + 1L
    }
  }

  message(
    "Loaded ", n_ok, " TUSCO result",
    if (n_ok == 1L) "" else "s",
    " from ", base_dir,
    if (n_skip > 0L) paste0(" (", n_skip, " skipped)") else ""
  )
  tusco_results
}

#' SIRV/TUSCO metric rows from `radar_df` (radarchart min/max + two metric rows).
extract_tusco_metric_rows <- function(radar_df) {
  if (is.null(radar_df) || !is.data.frame(radar_df)) {
    stop("radar_df must be a data.frame", call. = FALSE)
  }
  sirv_row <- "metrics_values_sirv"
  tusco_row <- "metrics_values_tusco"
  if (all(c(sirv_row, tusco_row) %in% rownames(radar_df))) {
    return(radar_df[c(sirv_row, tusco_row), , drop = FALSE])
  }
  if (nrow(radar_df) >= 4L) {
    out <- radar_df[3:4, , drop = FALSE]
    rownames(out) <- c(sirv_row, tusco_row)
    return(out)
  }
  stop(
    "radar_df must have rows named ", sirv_row, " and ", tusco_row,
    ", or at least 4 rows (radarchart min/max/SIRV/TUSCO).",
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

check_metrics_sn_pdr <- function(concat_df, tama_df) {
  check_one <- function(df, label) {
    if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) != 2L || !all(c("Sn", "PDR") %in% colnames(df))) {
      return(invisible(NULL))
    }
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
      sn <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[i, "Sn"]))
      pdr <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[i, "PDR"]))
      if (length(sn) != 1L || length(pdr) != 1L || is.na(sn) || is.na(pdr)) {
        next
      }
      if (sn > pdr) {
        rn <- rownames(df)[i]
        warning(
          sprintf(
            "%s %s: Sn (%.3f) > PDR (%.3f)",
            label, if (nzchar(rn)) rn else paste0("row", i), sn, pdr
          ),
          call. = FALSE
        )
      }
    }
    invisible(NULL)
  }
  check_one(concat_df, "concat_df")
  check_one(tama_df, "tama_df")
  invisible(NULL)
}

# Load all results (repo: reports/tusco_results)
tusco_results <- load_tusco_results(paper_tusco_results_dir())
```


```{r}
collect_names_at_level <- function(x, target_level, current_level = 1) {
  if (!is.list(x)) return(NULL)
  
  if (current_level == target_level) {
    return(names(x))
  }
  
  unlist(
    lapply(x, function(e) collect_names_at_level(e, target_level, current_level + 1)),
    use.names = FALSE
  )
}

f_names <- collect_names_at_level(tusco_results, target_level = 5)
table(f_names)

```

```{r}
rename_names_at_level <- function(x, target_level, current_level = 1) {
  if (!is.list(x)) return(x)

  if (current_level == target_level) {
    # Rename names at this level
    old_names <- names(x)
    new_names <- old_names

    new_names[old_names %in% c("Bconcat", "B100K0", "B100K0.join")] <- "concat"
    new_names[old_names %in% c("Kconcat", "B0K100", "B0K100.join")] <- "concat"

    # Assign and return
    names(x) <- new_names
    return(x)
  }

  # Recurse deeper
  lapply(x, function(e) rename_names_at_level(e, target_level, current_level + 1))
}

tusco_renamed <- rename_names_at_level(tusco_results, target_level = 5)

f_names <- collect_names_at_level(tusco_renamed, target_level = 5)
table(f_names)

```

```{r}
tusco_renamed$tusco_full$isoseq$isoquant$B100K0$B31
```


```{r}
tusco_renamed$tusco_full$isoseq$flair_ar_sr$B100K0$concat$radar_df[c("metrics_values_sirv", "metrics_values_tusco"),]
```

```{r}
tusco_renamed$tusco_full$isoseq$flair_ar_sr$B100K0$concat$radar_df[c(3, 4),]
```



```{r}
radar_df <- extract_tusco_metric_rows(
  tusco_renamed$tusco_full$isoseq$flair_ar_sr$B100K0$concat$radar_df
)
check_metrics_sn_pdr(radar_df, radar_df)
```


```{r}

tusco_renamed$tusco_full$isoseq$flair_ar_sr$B100K0$concat$radar

```


```{r}

assemble_radar_plots <- function(tusco_plot_list) {
  
  # Helper to apply consistent title styling
  style_title <- function(p, title) {
    p + ggtitle(title) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = paper_axis_text_x(0),
        axis.text.y = paper_axis_text_y(),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.position = "right"  # Ensure legend is enabled
      )
  }
  
  # Apply styling
  radar_jc <- style_title(tusco_plot_list$concat$radar, "Join & Call")
  radar_cj <- style_title(tusco_plot_list$TAMA$radar, "Call & Join")
  radar_b1 <- style_title(tusco_plot_list$B31$radar, "Brain 1")
  radar_b2 <- style_title(tusco_plot_list$B32$radar, "Brain 2")
  radar_b3 <- style_title(tusco_plot_list$B33$radar, "Brain 3")
  radar_b4 <- style_title(tusco_plot_list$B34$radar, "Brain 4")
  radar_b5 <- style_title(tusco_plot_list$B35$radar, "Brain 5")
  
  # Combine and collect guides for a shared legend
  radar_plot <- (
    radar_jc | radar_cj | radar_b1 | radar_b2 | radar_b3 | radar_b4 | radar_b5
  ) + plot_layout(guides = "collect") & theme(legend.position = "right")
  
  # Add global title
  radar_plot <- radar_plot +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "TUSCO_mouse, isoseq, isoquant, brain",
      theme = theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 22, face = "bold")
      )
    )
  
  return(radar_plot)
}


```

```{r}
radar_plot <- assemble_radar_plots(tusco_renamed$tusco_full$isoseq$isoquant$B100K0)
radar_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "radar_plot.pdf"), plot = radar_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```

```{r}


# 2. Create a dummy ggplot JUST to generate the legend
legend_df <- data.frame(
  label = c("SIRVs", "TUSCO"),
  x = c(1, 2), y = c(1, 1)  # dummy coords
)

legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_df, aes(x, y, color = label)) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = NULL,
    values = c("SIRVs" = "#cab2d6", "TUSCO" = "#1b9e77")
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "right",
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.key.size   = unit(1, "lines")
  )

# 3. Extract the legend grob
legend_grob <- cowplot::get_legend(legend_plot)

# 4. Combine radar plot + legend side by side
final_plot <- plot_grid(
  radar_plot, 
  legend_grob,
  ncol        = 2,
  rel_widths  = c(1, 0.05)   # tweak the 0.2 to make legend bigger/smaller
)

# 5. Draw the whole thing
print(final_plot)
paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "radar_plot.pdf"), plot = final_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")

```


```{r}

# Function 1: Preprocess two data frames (concat, tama) into long form
preprocess_metrics <- function(concat_df, tama_df) {
  # Ensure both dfs have exactly two rows (SIRV then TUSCO) 
  # and the same set of metric columns
  if (nrow(concat_df) != 2 || nrow(tama_df) != 2) {
    stop("Each input df must have exactly two rows: first SIRV then TUSO")
  }
  if (!identical(colnames(concat_df), colnames(tama_df))) {
    stop("concat_df and tama_df must have the same column names")
  }
  
  metric_names <- colnames(concat_df)
  
  # Build long tables
  concat_long <- tibble(
    method_dataset = rep(c("concat_sirv", "concat_tusco"), each = length(metric_names)),
    metric         = rep(metric_names, times = 2),
    value          = c(as.numeric(concat_df[1, ]), as.numeric(concat_df[2, ]))
  )
  
  tama_long <- tibble(
    method_dataset = rep(c("tama_sirv", "tama_tusco"), each = length(metric_names)),
    metric         = rep(metric_names, times = 2),
    value          = c(as.numeric(tama_df[1, ]), as.numeric(tama_df[2, ]))
  )
  
  # Combine
  bind_rows(concat_long, tama_long)
}



build_dumbbell_plot <- function(metrics_long,
                                title,
                                metric_order = c("Sn", "PDR", "nrPre", "rPre", "1/red", "1-FDR")
) {
  # 0) make metric a factor in the desired order
  metrics_long <- metrics_long %>%
    mutate(metric = factor(metric, levels = rev(metric_order)))
  
  # 1) Pivot to wide for segments
  metrics_wide <- metrics_long %>%
    separate(method_dataset, into = c("method", "dataset"), sep = "_") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = method, values_from = value)
  
  # 2) Prepare points data
  points_df <- metrics_wide %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols      = c(concat, tama),
      names_to  = "method",
      values_to = "value"
    )
  
  # 3) Build plot
  p <- ggplot() +
    # striped rows
    paper_geom_stripped_rows(
      data = metrics_wide,
      aes(y = metric),
      width   = 1,
      nudge_y = 0
    ) +
    paper_geom_dumbbell_vguides() +
    # segments
    geom_segment(
      data = metrics_wide,
      aes(x     = concat, xend = tama,
          y     = metric, yend = metric,
          color = dataset),
      size     = 1.2,
      position = position_nudge(
        y = ifelse(metrics_wide$dataset == "sirv",  0.15, -0.15)
      )
    ) +
    # endpoints
    geom_point(
      data = points_df,
      aes(x     = value,
          y     = metric,
          shape = method,
          fill  = dataset,
          color = dataset),
      size     = 3,
      stroke   = 0.8,
      position = position_nudge(
        y = ifelse(points_df$dataset == "sirv",  0.15, -0.15)
      )
    ) +
    # scales and legends
    scale_color_manual(
      name   = "Evaluation",
      values = c("sirv"  = "#cab2d6", "tusco" = "#1b9e77"),
      labels = c("sirv"  = "SIRVs",    "tusco" = "TUSCO"),
      guide  = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(linetype = 1, size = 2, shape = NA),
        order = 1
      )
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("sirv" = "#cab2d6", "tusco" = "#1b9e77"),
      guide  = "none"
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      name   = "Strategy",
      values = c("concat" = 16, "tama" = 17),
      labels = c("concat" = "Join & Call", "tama" = "Call & Join"),
      guide  = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(fill = "black", size = 3),
        order = 2
      )
    ) +
    # axes, padding, clipping & theme
    paper_dumbbell_x_scale() +
    scale_y_discrete() +               # uses levels of metric factor
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    labs(x = "Metric value (%)", y = NULL, title = title) +
    paper_dumbbell_theme(legend_position = "right", legend_box = "horizontal")
  
  return(p)
}


```




```{r}


build_indiv_dumbbell_plot <- function(metrics_long,
                                      title,
                                      dataset_to_plot, # <-- New argument
                                      metric_order = c("Sn", "PDR", "nrPre", "rPre", "1/red", "1-FDR")
) {
  # 0) make metric a factor in the desired order
  metrics_long <- metrics_long %>%
    mutate(metric = factor(metric, levels = rev(metric_order)))
  
  # 1) Pivot to wide for segments
  metrics_wide <- metrics_long %>%
    separate(method_dataset, into = c("method", "dataset"), sep = "_") %>%
    filter(dataset == dataset_to_plot) %>% # <-- Filter for the specific dataset
    pivot_wider(names_from = method, values_from = value)
  
  # 2) Prepare points data
  points_df <- metrics_wide %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols      = c(concat, tama),
      names_to  = "method",
      values_to = "value"
    )
  
  # 3) Build plot
  p <- ggplot() +
    # striped rows
    paper_geom_stripped_rows(
      data = metrics_wide,
      aes(y = metric),
      width   = 1,
      nudge_y = 0
    ) +
    paper_geom_dumbbell_vguides() +
    # segments
    geom_segment(
      data = metrics_wide,
      aes(x    = concat, xend = tama,
          y    = metric, yend = metric),
      color    = "black", # <-- Set color directly
      size     = 1.2
      # position = position_nudge() removed
    ) +
    # endpoints
    geom_point(
      data = points_df,
      aes(x     = value,
          y     = metric,
          shape = method),
      color    = "black", # <-- Set color directly
      fill     = "black", # <-- Set fill directly
      size     = 3,
      stroke   = 0.8
      # position = position_nudge() removed
    ) +
    # scales and legends
    # scale_color_manual() removed
    # scale_fill_manual() removed
    scale_shape_manual(
      name   = "Strategy",
      values = c("concat" = 16, "tama" = 17), # 16=filled circle, 17=filled triangle
      labels = c("concat" = "Join & Call", "tama" = "Call & Join"),
      guide  = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(fill = "black", size = 3),
        order = 1 # Now this is the only legend
      )
    ) +
    # axes, padding, clipping & theme
    paper_dumbbell_x_scale() +
    scale_y_discrete() +           # uses levels of metric factor
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    labs(x = "Metric value (%)", y = NULL, title = title) +
    paper_dumbbell_theme(legend_position = "right")
  
  return(p)
}

```


```{r}

tool_labels <- c(
  isoquant     = "IsoQuant",
  flair_ar_sr  = "FLAIR",
  bambu        = "Bambu",
  talon        = "TALON",
  mandalorion  = "Mandalorion",
  isoseq       = "IsoSeq + SQANTI3"
)

# - Top level: tusco_full and tusco-tissue
for (tusco_type in c("tusco_full", "tusco_brain", "tusco_kidney")){
  tusco_list <- tusco_renamed[[tusco_type]]
  
  # — Next level: data types
  for (datatype in c("isoseq", "ont")) {
    dt_list <- tusco_list[[datatype]]
    if (is.null(dt_list)) next
    
    # — Next level: tools under each data type
    for (tool in names(dt_list)) {
      # skip any unexpected names
      if (!tool %in% names(tool_labels)) next
      pretty_tool <- tool_labels[[tool]]
      
      tissue_list <- dt_list[[tool]]
      
      # — For each combination within this tool
      for (tissue in names(tissue_list)) {
        branch <- tissue_list[[tissue]]
        
        if (is.null(branch$concat) || is.null(branch$TAMA) ||
            is.null(branch$concat$radar_df) || is.null(branch$TAMA$radar_df)) {
          warning(
            "Skipping ", paste(datatype, tool, tissue),
            ": missing concat or TAMA radar_df",
            call. = FALSE
          )
          next
        }
        
        # 1) extract SIRV/TUSCO metric rows (rows 3–4 or named rows)
        concat_df <- extract_tusco_metric_rows(branch$concat$radar_df)
        tama_df   <- extract_tusco_metric_rows(branch$TAMA$radar_df)
        
        # 1.5) check Sn PDR metrics
        check_metrics_sn_pdr(concat_df, tama_df)
        
        # 2) preprocess and build plot
        metrics_long <- preprocess_metrics(concat_df, tama_df)
        p            <- build_dumbbell_plot(metrics_long, pretty_tool)
        ps           <- build_indiv_dumbbell_plot(metrics_long, pretty_tool, "sirv")
        pt           <- build_indiv_dumbbell_plot(metrics_long, pretty_tool, "tusco")
        
        # 3) assign back into the list
        tusco_renamed[[tusco_type]][[datatype]][[tool]][[tissue]]$dumbbell_plot <- p
        tusco_renamed[[tusco_type]][[datatype]][[tool]][[tissue]]$db_sirv_plot <- ps
        tusco_renamed[[tusco_type]][[datatype]][[tool]][[tissue]]$db_tusco_plot <- pt
      }
    }
  }
}

```

```{r}
tusco_renamed$tusco_full$isoseq$isoseq$B100K0$db_tusco_plot
```

```{r}

assemble_dumbbell_plots <- function(results, tissue, tusco_type, plot_name="dumbbell_plot") {
  
  if (tissue == "B100K0") {
    tissue_name <- "brain"
  } else if (tissue == "B0K100") {
    tissue_name <- "kidney"
  } else {
    stop("Error: unknown tissue code '", tissue, "'")
  }
  
  if (tusco_type == "tusco_full") {
    tusco_type_name <- "TUSCO (mouse)"
  } else if (tusco_type == "tusco_brain") {
    tusco_type_name <- "TUSCO (mouse brain)"
  } else if (tusco_type == "tusco_kidney") {
    tusco_type_name <- "TUSCO (mouse kidney)"
  } else {
    stop("Error: unknown tusco_type code '", tusco_type, "'")
  }
  
  if (plot_name == "dumbbell_plot"){
    plot_title <- paste0("SIRV and ", tusco_type_name, " evaluation", "; ", tissue_name)
  } else if (plot_name == "db_sirv_plot"){
    plot_title <- paste0("SIRV evaluation", "; ", tissue_name)
  } else if (plot_name == "db_tusco_plot"){
    plot_title <- paste0(tusco_type_name, " evaluation", "; ", tissue_name)
  } else {
    stop("Error: unknown plot_name '", plot_name, "'")
  }

  #' Per-panel theme: no legend; no x title (shared via figure caption).
  strip_db_panel <- function(p, hide_x_ticks = FALSE) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::theme(
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_blank()
      )
    if (isTRUE(hide_x_ticks)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::theme(
          axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.x = ggplot2::element_blank()
        )
    }
    p
  }
  
  raw_legend   <- get_legend(
    results[[tusco_type]]$isoseq$isoquant[[tissue]][[plot_name]]
  )
  legend_panel <- as_ggplot(raw_legend)
  
  db_1_1 <- strip_db_panel(results[[tusco_type]]$isoseq$isoquant[[tissue]][[plot_name]])
  db_1_2 <- strip_db_panel(results[[tusco_type]]$isoseq$flair_ar_sr[[tissue]][[plot_name]])
  db_1_3 <- strip_db_panel(
    results[[tusco_type]]$isoseq$bambu[[tissue]][[plot_name]],
    hide_x_ticks = TRUE
  )
  db_1_4 <- strip_db_panel(
    results[[tusco_type]]$isoseq$talon[[tissue]][[plot_name]],
    hide_x_ticks = TRUE
  )
  db_2_1 <- strip_db_panel(results[[tusco_type]]$isoseq$mandalorion[[tissue]][[plot_name]])
  db_2_2 <- strip_db_panel(results[[tusco_type]]$isoseq$isoseq[[tissue]][[plot_name]])
  db_3_1 <- strip_db_panel(results[[tusco_type]]$ont$isoquant[[tissue]][[plot_name]])
  db_3_2 <- strip_db_panel(results[[tusco_type]]$ont$flair_ar_sr[[tissue]][[plot_name]])
  db_3_3 <- strip_db_panel(results[[tusco_type]]$ont$bambu[[tissue]][[plot_name]])
  db_3_4 <- strip_db_panel(results[[tusco_type]]$ont$talon[[tissue]][[plot_name]])
  
  db_plot <- (
    db_1_1 + db_1_2 + db_1_3 + db_1_4 +
    db_2_1 + db_2_2 + legend_panel +
    plot_spacer() +
    db_3_1 + db_3_2 + db_3_3 + db_3_4
  ) +
    paper_mouse_10panel_plot_layout(
      heights = c(1, 1, 0.2, 1),
      axes = "collect",
      axis_titles = "keep"
    ) +
    paper_figure_annotation(
      title = plot_title,
      x_label = "Metric value (%)"
    )
  
  paper_inset_tags_rows(
    wrap_elements(full = db_plot),
    tag_by_row = c("1" = "a", "4" = "b"),
    heights = c(1, 1, 0.2, 1)
  )

}


```



```{r}
brain_db_plot <- assemble_dumbbell_plots(tusco_renamed, "B100K0", "tusco_full")
brain_db_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "brain_db_full_plot.pdf"), plot = brain_db_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```

```{r}
kidney_db_plot <- assemble_dumbbell_plots(tusco_renamed, "B0K100", "tusco_full")
kidney_db_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "kidney_db_full_plot.pdf"), plot = kidney_db_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```

```{r}
brain_db_tissue_plot <- assemble_dumbbell_plots(tusco_renamed, "B100K0", "tusco_brain")
brain_db_tissue_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "brain_db_tissue_plot.pdf"), plot = brain_db_tissue_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```

```{r}
kidney_db_tissue_plot <- assemble_dumbbell_plots(tusco_renamed, "B0K100", "tusco_kidney")
kidney_db_tissue_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "kidney_db_tissue_plot.pdf"), plot = kidney_db_tissue_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```


```{r}
brain_sirv_plot <- assemble_dumbbell_plots(tusco_renamed, "B100K0", "tusco_full", "db_sirv_plot")
brain_sirv_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "brain_sirv_plot.pdf"), plot = brain_sirv_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```

```{r}
brain_tusco_plot <- assemble_dumbbell_plots(tusco_renamed, "B100K0", "tusco_full", "db_tusco_plot")
brain_tusco_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "brain_tusco_plot.pdf"), plot = brain_tusco_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```

```{r}
brain_tusco_tissue_plot <- assemble_dumbbell_plots(tusco_renamed, "B100K0", "tusco_brain", "db_tusco_plot")
brain_tusco_tissue_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "brain_tusco_tissue_plot.pdf"), plot = brain_tusco_tissue_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```



```{r}
kidney_sirv_plot <- assemble_dumbbell_plots(tusco_renamed, "B0K100", "tusco_full", "db_sirv_plot")
kidney_sirv_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "kidney_sirv_plot.pdf"), plot = kidney_sirv_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```

```{r}
kidney_tusco_plot <- assemble_dumbbell_plots(tusco_renamed, "B0K100", "tusco_full", "db_tusco_plot")
kidney_tusco_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "kidney_tusco_plot.pdf"), plot = kidney_tusco_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```

```{r}
kidney_tusco_tissue_plot <- assemble_dumbbell_plots(tusco_renamed, "B0K100", "tusco_kidney", "db_tusco_plot")
kidney_tusco_tissue_plot

paper_ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "kidney_tusco_tissue_plot.pdf"), plot = kidney_tusco_tissue_plot, size = "mouse_10panel")
```

```{r}


```
